footer.brandDesc: A Kenya-based talent execution platform designed to mobilise diaspora professionals into local venture-building and consultancy engagements. Transforming brain drain into brain circulation.
footer.compliance: Compliant with the Kenya Data Protection Act, 2019

about.title: About Us | Strategic Pathways

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.headline: Where Global Skills Come Full Circle
mission.body: Mobilising study-abroad returnees and diaspora professionals into collaborative projects, consultancy engagements, and venture-building initiatives that strengthen local economies.

problem.headline: The Missing Link in Kenyan Talent.
problem.body1: Each year, thousands of Kenyans study and work abroad, gaining advanced education and global exposure. However, returning home often means encountering fragmented networks and underutilisation of skills.
problem.quote: This disconnect reinforces patterns of brain drain rather than enabling sustainable brain circulation.

expertise.title: Global Expertise
expertise.desc: Remains disconnected from local economic opportunities upon return.

gaps.title: Local Gaps
gaps.desc: SMEs, NGOs, and counties face challenges accessing reliable execution-ready talent.

solution.headline: The Proposed Solution
solution.subheadline: A digital-enabled platform operating as a talent execution and venture-building ecosystem.

items.title: Digital Onboarding
items.desc: Seamless profile management and verified credential tracking.

items.title: Team Assembly
items.desc: Structured cross-functional team formation for specific projects.

items.title: Project Coordination
items.desc: Managing consultancy engagements and local economic initiatives.

items.title: Venture Incubation
items.desc: Supporting new enterprise development and scaling innovations.

items.title: Institutional Partnering
items.desc: Bridging talent direct to counties, universities, NGOs, and donors.

items.title: Execution Focus
items.desc: Not a job board—a platform for executing high-impact, coordinated work.

objectives.headline: Initial 12-Month Objectives
list: Develop and launch a functional MVP digital platform.
Onboard at least 500 globally trained and locally skilled professionals.
Establish partnerships with 5–7 institutions (universities, counties, NGOs).
Deliver 5–8 pilot projects or consultancy engagements.
Create at least 50 short-term or project-based income opportunities.

short.title: Short-Term
short.desc: Increased engagement of globally trained professionals. Structured collaboration pathways established.

medium.title: Medium-Term
medium.desc: Job/income creation through project-based work. Launch of new ventures supported by cross-functional teams.

long.title: Long-Term Vision
long.desc1: Transitioning from Brain Drain to Brain Circulation.
long.desc2: Sustainable local economic growth driven by globally informed expertise.

about.conclusion: Strategic Pathways ensures that global skills do not remain abroad or unused.
